name: cycles-mcp-server
display_name: Cycles — Budget Authority for AI Agents
description: Runtime budget authority for AI agents — reserve, enforce, reconcile spend across providers
long_description: Gives Claude runtime budget, action, and audit authority via the Cycles protocol. The agent reserves budget before costly operations (LLM calls, tool invocations, external actions), commits actual usage afterward, and is denied when policy or balance would be exceeded. Includes 9 tools covering the full reserve/commit/release lifecycle, preflight decisions, balances, reservations, and fire-and-forget usage events, plus built-in prompts for designing budget strategies and diagnosing overruns. Requires a Cycles server (https://runcycles.io) — or enable mock mode to evaluate the tool surface with synthetic responses and no enforcement.

base_url.title: Cycles Server URL
base_url.description: URL of your Cycles server, e.g. https://api.runcycles.io. Not needed when mock mode is enabled.

api_key.title: Cycles API Key
api_key.description: API key for your Cycles server. Not needed when mock mode is enabled.

mock_mode.title: Mock mode (evaluation only — no enforcement)
mock_mode.description: Return synthetic ALLOW responses without contacting a Cycles server. Lets you explore the tools, but performs no budget enforcement.

default_tenant.title: Default tenant
default_tenant.description: Optional default tenant merged into any tool call that omits it, so the agent can call budget tools without repeating the subject.

default_workspace.title: Default workspace
default_workspace.description: Optional default workspace merged into any tool call that omits it, so the agent can call budget tools without repeating the subject.

default_app.title: Default app
default_app.description: Optional default app merged into any tool call that omits it, so the agent can call budget tools without repeating the subject.

default_workflow.title: Default workflow
default_workflow.description: Optional default workflow merged into any tool call that omits it, so the agent can call budget tools without repeating the subject.

default_agent.title: Default agent
default_agent.description: Optional default agent merged into any tool call that omits it, so the agent can call budget tools without repeating the subject.

default_toolset.title: Default toolset
default_toolset.description: Optional default toolset merged into any tool call that omits it, so the agent can call budget tools without repeating the subject.

tools.name: cycles_reserve
tools.description: Reserve budget before a costly operation

tools.name: cycles_commit
tools.description: Commit actual usage after an operation completes

tools.name: cycles_check_balance
tools.description: Check current budget balance for a scope

tools.name: cycles_create_event
tools.description: Record usage without the reserve/commit lifecycle
